raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The closure of the Madera Community Hospital in December 2022 left hundreds of thousands without emergency medical care.",
    "Over 900 healthcare workers were displaced by the closure of the Madera Community Hospital.",
    "Patients in the Madera community were forced to travel long distances for urgent care due to the hospital's closure.",
    "The implementation of the Distressed Hospital Loan Program addressed the financial challenges faced by healthcare facilities in California.",
    "Madera Community Hospital received $57 million from the Distressed Hospital Loan Program to aid its reopening."
  ]
}
```
